data.body: DEPLOY ATTESTATION (2026-07-13): the autolander service is DEPLOYED + LIVE on the Gerrit EC2 host (i-00880b2c7f13527c5) — compose-autolander-1 running, health=healthy, 0 restarts; flock autolander.lock + heartbeat + recovery live in the gerrit_autolander state volume; willfarrell/autoheal sidecar present; status endpoint served via nginx https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/autolander/status (200 JSON: heartbeat_age_s/phase/waiting_count); AUTOLANDER_GERRIT_TOKEN sourced from SSM /rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token; CloudWatch alarm rebar-autolander-errors live; Gerrit Autosubmit label + rebase ACL live. Proven end-to-end by dogfood: change #618 landed by the bot (submitter 'Rebar Bot Nava').
